allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Claude Code best practices template

Production-ready template with CLAUDE.md, hooks \(block-dangerous, validate-write,
auto-format, pre-commit-validate\), skills \(TDD, code-review, security-audit,
doc-and-clear\), agents \(code-reviewer, researcher, refactorer\), slash commands
\(catchup, review, deploy-check, plan, explain, test-gen, refactor\), progressive
disclosure docs, and setup scripts for Windows and Linux/Mac.
EOF
\)")
